message:
test(conformance): add termios, resource, locale conformance harnesses

Adds fixture validation tests for:
- termios_ops: tcgetattr, cfgetispeed/ospeed, cfsetispeed/ospeed (10 tests)
- resource_ops: getrlimit, RLIMIT_NOFILE/STACK, invalid resource (10 tests)
- locale_ops: setlocale, localeconv, nl_langinfo, newlocale/uselocale/duplocale/freelocale (12 tests)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
